published_prior_art.cite: ArnoldBerrieTennantGilthorpe2020 + TomovaGilthorpeTennant2022 classify fixed-total relative/substitution effects; Piepel2006 gives direction-dependent mixture slopes, but none explicitly names the full zero-diameter frontier.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest catalogue entries are pid_dose_response_iv and pid_dose_response_shape, both partial-ID continuous-dose sensitivity/shape proposals rather than exact simplex reallocation.

published_prior_art.cite: HiranoImbens2004 identifies continuous-treatment dose response under weak unconfoundedness; Piepel2006 covers affine direction/reference dependence for mixture slopes.
Piepel2006: component slopes in linear mixture models are direction/reference dependent, which already implies sign changes can occur across directions.
HinesDiazOrdazVansteelandt2026 treats average derivative effects for continuous treatments; this is a simplex-to-Euclidean recovery specialization.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the flagship comparator chain is underdeveloped; VanderWeeleHernan2013 should be treated as a load-bearing rules-as-versions comparator, not ancillary related work.

novelty_flags.label: Proposition 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The opposite-sign witness is a causal relabelling of Piepel2006-style direction/reference dependence for linear mixture slopes.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed iff between kappa_j(a)=0 and equality of all tau_j(a;q) is exactly the diameter-zero unfold of the defined frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proof route is mostly definition unfolds plus an affine image/extreme-point calculation, so it does not yet clear the nontrivial flagship-kernel floor.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The iff using rho_j(a)=0 omits a full-support condition such as Q_j(a)=Delta_{-j}; with restricted admissible rules, invariance can hold even when displaced ambient derivatives differ.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the tautological diameter-zero iff with an independent observable or design-level characterization, e.g. a testable gradient-equality condition over the support-admissible face with a nontrivial necessity proof.
Repair Corollary 1 by adding Q_j(a)=Delta_{-j} or by restating rho_j as the diameter over the actually admissible displaced-gradient convex hull.

To reach flagship tier, add a strict comparator-facing result against multiple-versions or compositional-substitution literature, such as an iff frontier showing exactly when all rule-specific version effects collapse to a single estimand and when they do not.

recommended_next_step: Revise the kernel so the frontier criterion is not merely definitional, fix the ambient-recovery iff, and promote the multiple-versions comparator into the main theorem framing.
